title: Dev v0.5.21 My Items Panel Cleanup
notes:
Changes:
- Removes the visible Player Items / Totals right-side panel from Dev's My Items tab.
- Keeps hidden playerTotals and ownedList hooks so older renderer code does not crash.
- Keeps Item Lookup.
- Keeps Player Boosts removed from the visible tab bar.

Reason:
The real game has upgrades that change how totals work, so showing fake/estimated totals can be misleading.

Publish:
